anchor_window.label: Anchor Window
anchor_window.description: Lorecard is eligible inside a bounded episode or story window.

character_state.label: Character State
character_state.description: Lorecard constrains season-local character behavior or status.

knowledge_gate.label: Knowledge Gate
knowledge_gate.description: Lorecard controls what is known, hidden, or misunderstood in Context.

lore_gate.label: Lore Gate
lore_gate.description: Lorecard defines a durable setting, technology, faction, or command rule.

reveal_gate.label: Reveal Gate
reveal_gate.description: Lorecard becomes eligible only after a season-local reveal.

relationship_state.label: Relationship State
relationship_state.description: Lorecard constrains a bond, obligation, grief state, or trust state.

spoiler_guard.label: Spoiler Guard
spoiler_guard.description: Lorecard prevents later canon from leaking backward.
